title: justicia rectiflora
intro: Justicia rectiflora, also known as the "Rectiflora" or "Justicia", is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Justicia rectiflora include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Justicia rectiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
